name: Shandong Dongyue Organosilicon Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Shandong Dongyue Organosilicon Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of silicone materials in China. Its principal products include silicone monomers, silicone intermediates, fumed silica, and silicone rubber, silicone oil, and other deep-processed products. The company also exports its products to Dubai, South Korea, Belgium, the United States, Italy, India, Malaysia, Turkey, and Taiwan. Shandong Dongyue Organosilicon Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is based in Zibo, China.
